title: ERROR 1194 (HY000): Table 't' is marked as crashed and should be repaired
poc: CREATE TABLE t (a DATETIME NOT NULL) ENGINE=CSV;
key_bug_features: Table marked as crashed after insert operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (a DATETIME NOT NULL, b INT DEFAULT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB;
INSERT INTO t (a, b) VALUES ('2023-01-01 00:00:00', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
